channel.title: OOIR Trends: Clinical Medicine (Medicine, General & Internal)
channel.description: Aktuelle Paper-Trends im Bereich Clinical Medicine (Medicine, General & Internal) von OOIR (mit Titel und Metadaten von Crossref)

item.title: Daraxonrasib or Chemotherapy in Previously Treated Metastatic Pancreatic Cancer
item.description: Feld: Clinical Medicine Kategorie: Medicine, General & Internal Score: 3172 Autoren: Eileen M. O’Reilly, Zev A. Wainberg, Andrew E. Hendifar, Mitesh J. Borad, Filippo Pietrantonio, Shubham Pant, Pascal Hammel, Chiara Cremolini, Gulam A. Manji, Paul E. Oberstein, Ignacio Garrido-Laguna, Christoph Springfeld, Nilofer S. Azad, Makoto Ueno, Stephen Y. Chui, Ying Zhang, Hina Patel, Yeonju Lee, Zeena Salman, Brian M. Wolpin Journal: New England Journal of Medicine Veröffentlicht: 2026-05-31 DOI: 10.1056/nejmoa2605555 ISSN: 0028-4793 Tag der Erhebung (OOIR): 2026-06-24

item.title: Cervical cancer mortality trends following HPV vaccination in England, 2001–24: an analysis of population-based mortality data
item.description: Feld: Clinical Medicine Kategorie: Medicine, General & Internal Score: 2301 Autoren: Peter Sasieni, Milena Falcaro Journal: The Lancet Veröffentlicht: 2026-06-01 DOI: 10.1016/s0140-6736(26)00918-9 ISSN: 0140-6736 Tag der Erhebung (OOIR): 2026-06-24

item.title: Phase 3 Results of Bepirovirsen Treatment for Chronic Hepatitis B Virus Infection

item.title: Suicide Mortality Among Adolescents and Young Adults After Launch of a Suicide and Crisis Lifeline
item.description: Feld: Clinical Medicine Kategorie: Medicine, General & Internal Score: 995 Autoren: Vishal R. Patel, Michael Liu, Anupam B. Jena Journal: JAMA Veröffentlicht: 2026-05-19 Abstract: This study uses data from the National Vital Statistics System to examine quarterly suicide mortality among individuals aged 15 to 34 years. DOI: 10.1001/jama.2026.5157 ISSN: 0098-7484 Tag der Erhebung (OOIR): 2026-06-24

item.title: In Vivo Base Editing of PCSK9 with VERVE-102 for Hypercholesterolemia
